-- 1 of 3 --

Introduction
!
Welcome to Module 3.
!
In Modules 1 and 2, I gave you a ton of frameworks. We talked about the core
strategies and the tactics of Product Launch Formula. We talked about the Business
Launch Formula. We talked about the mental triggers and how to use story in your
launches and in your business. I really think Modules 1 and 2, you just don't do
anything else and your business life will never be the same, but at the same point, that
was some pretty conceptual stuff. It was some pretty intense stuff.
!
Now it's time to drill down and get nitty-gritty, because there is a lot going on behind
the scenes in PLF. But I didn't get to where I am at, in terms of creating this amazing
success for my PLF owners, by teaching conceptual stuff. Now it's time to get into the
nitty-gritty, into the “how to do this stuff,” the hardcore, exactly where pieces fit
together.
!
In Module 3 we're going to talk about, “getting to the money fast.” That's what this is
all about. It's about the two fastest and easiest types of launches – the seed launch
and the quick launch.
!
The seed launch, that's where you start out with no list and no product and
you basically get paid to create your product and it's awesome.
!
The quick launch is if you already have a list, if you already have an offer, a
product, then it's a way to get a really quick cash infusion and it's simple,
easy, fun, and it can be quite lucrative.
!
If you're just starting out, seed launch is awesome. Also, if you have a new idea you
want to test out, if you want to get paid to create a product before you actually... You
get paid before you create the product. That's what I'm trying to say. That's a seed
launch. The quick launch is just super simple way to bring in a bunch of cash quickly.
!
In the Business Launch Formula, there are those three big guns of the launch world.
! 1. 	There's the seed launch, where you're just starting out.
2. 	There's the internal launch, when you just launch to your list.
3. 	There's the JV launches where you really blow it up and you bring in other
people to help you promote.
!
Those are the three big guns and the fourth one is the quick launch.
!
In this module, we're going to do quick launch and the seed launch. And as we go
forward, in the next module and the next module, we'll get deep into the internal
launch and the JV launch.
!

-- 2 of 3 --

You're doing fantastic, to be in Module 3, you're the cream of the crop. And the thing
you have to remember is that it is about baby steps. It's about taking those small,
incremental steps that add up to huge exponential change. That's how I got to where
I'm at. It's just by taking one small step, getting the opt-in form up, getting that blog
post published, getting that email written – one step at a time. No one is an instant
success. It is baby steps.
!
One of the easiest baby steps for you is to take part in the community. Leave a
comment, encourage people, ask questions. One of the absolute best, easiest steps you
can take. Leave a comment on this video. Just say, “Jeff, I love it. I'm here.” Just say,
“Jeff, I'm here.” That's all I want, just to get you moving, because I do know... I've
taught thousands and thousands of people and it's about taking those baby steps, it's
about staying the course, it's about those small, incremental changes that add up to big
changes.
!
Lots of people have been down this path before. They've just taken this material,
they've gone through the material, they followed the formula, and they've rocked it.
That's what you need to do. Just keep on taking those small steps, moving through it.
Lots of people have had success.
!
One of the best things you can do is go back through after you go through the whole
module, then go back and watch it a second time. Because that's what I always do. If
I'm really digging into a course, into a book or something, then it's like, “Wow. This is
really where it's at. This is where I'm going. This is what I want to pursue.” I'll get to
the end and then I'll just go right back to the beginning and start it over. Repetition, it's
the mother of all learning.
